name: Finch Unified Payroll & HRIS API
what_it_does: Unified payroll and HRIS API providing a single normalized interface for 200+ payroll systems and HR platforms — enabling benefits, insurance, and HR tech companies to read employee, employment, and payroll data without building individual connectors.
use_cases: Reading employee directory and employment data from any payroll system via single API
Automating benefits enrollment using consistent employee data across payroll providers
Syncing compensation and pay statement data from ADP, Gusto, Rippling, etc.
Insurance and financial wellness apps reading payroll data for eligibility checks
HR tech integrations that need consistent employment status across provider diversity
not_for: Writing data back to payroll systems (Finch is primarily read-only)
Real-time payroll data — syncs happen on schedule based on provider
Non-employment data categories (Finch focuses on employment/payroll specifically)
best_when: An HR tech, benefits, or insurance company needs to read employee and payroll data from the diverse landscape of employer payroll systems via a single normalized API.
avoid_when: You need to write data to payroll systems, need real-time data, or are building integrations outside employment/payroll category.

auth.notes: OAuth2 with employer-specific access tokens. Finch Connect UI handles employer OAuth flow. Access token per employer connection. Scopes control data category access (directory, employment, payment, etc.).

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-connection pricing; contact sales. Estimated $X/connection/month based on data categories
pricing.notes: B2B pricing targeting HR tech and benefits companies. Per-employer-connection model. Strong specialization in payroll/HRIS space. YC W21. Trusted by 1000+ companies.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per access token; sync frequency depends on provider

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Comprehensive API documentation with normalized data models. OAuth2 with scoped access. Webhook support for data sync events. Sandbox environment for testing without live employer connections. Error responses include provider-specific context.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All read operations are idempotent — Finch handles sync. Data returned represents last synced state. Finch handles retry logic against underlying providers.
known_agent_gotchas: Employer must complete OAuth via Finch Connect before data is accessible
Sync frequency varies by provider — some update daily, some weekly
Data coverage varies by provider — not all fields available for all payroll systems
Payroll data (pay statements) requires separate scope and has higher access bar

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. OAuth2 with granular scopes. SOC2 Type II certified. GDPR compliant. Payroll data handled with bank-grade security. Access tokens scoped per employer and data category.
